summary: ISS-1877 body-prose work complete. EXP-432-baby-batch-2.json contains a single-paragraph replacement for SEC-4.2.4 (p4-424) opening body paragraph: anchors four E-PRED sub-test enumeration to 2026-03-12 snapshot, notes only E-PRED-B labeled as of 2026-05-07. Analogous to already-integrated EXP-292 (SEC-8b.3). TLDR was already fixed 2026-05-08. This completes all remaining work for ISS-1877.
